user.title: Connect to DiscoPanel
user.description: Enter the connection details for your DiscoPanel instance. The API token can be created in the DiscoPanel UI under API Tokens.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate DiscoPanel
reauth_confirm.description: The API token for {host} is no longer valid. Enter a new API token.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check the host, port and SSL settings.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Check your API token.

abort.already_configured: This DiscoPanel instance is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll DiscoPanel for updates. Minimum 10 seconds.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Send a console command to a DiscoPanel-managed Minecraft server.

server_id.name: Server ID
server_id.description: The DiscoPanel server id to target.

command.name: Command
command.description: The Minecraft console command to run, without a leading slash.

silent.name: Silent
silent.description: If enabled, suppress broadcasting the command output to the server console.
